query.description: A SPARQL 1.1 query (SELECT, ASK, CONSTRUCT, or DESCRIBE). Mutually exclusive with update.

update.description: A SPARQL 1.1 Update operation (INSERT DATA, DELETE DATA, etc.). Mutually exclusive with query.

using-graph-uri.description: Default graph URI for the query.

using-named-graph-uri.description: Named graph URI for the query.
